title: Types
description: Common scalar types and shared structures used across rdmmesh entities. Not generated as a class by itself — each definition is referenced from other schemas via $ref.

om_user_id.description: OpenMetadata User.id (UUID). The single source of truth for user identity. RDM stores it directly; AD/Keycloak ids are mapped via rdm_user_mapping.

om_domain_id.description: OpenMetadata Domain.id (UUID). RDM mirrors domains from OM; the local Domain row references this id.

iso_language.description: Supported UI / label languages in the MVP.

localized_label.title: LocalizedLabel
localized_label.description: ru/en label pair. The 'en' fallback is used by the UI when the requested language is missing.

qualified_name.description: Lower snake_case identifier; used for domain/codeset names that participate in the OM FQN 'rdmmesh.<domain>.<codeset>'.

key_part.description: Single component of a CodeItem composite key. Always serialised as string for schema-agnostic indexing; numeric keys are stored as their canonical decimal representation.

instant.description: ISO-8601 timestamp with offset (UTC by convention).

business_date.description: Calendar date (no time, no zone). Used for effective_from / effective_to.
